name: Hong Kong
authority: Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) / Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA)

unhostedWallets.notes: Licensed VATPs must take reasonable measures to verify the identity of originators and beneficiaries for unhosted wallet transfers. Risk-based approach for transfers above the enhanced-info threshold.

rules.notes: AMLO Chapter 12 amendments effective June 1, 2023. Travel rule applies to ALL virtual asset transfers regardless of amount. Basic info (name, account number) required for all transfers. For transfers >= HKD 8,000: expanded originator info required (address, ID document number). Both SFC (for VATPs) and HKMA (for authorized institutions) enforce AMLO travel rule requirements.
